name: Windows Recovery Partition Editor
description: Windows Recovery Partition Editor resizes the local Windows Recovery Partition to 984MB and injects CAB files to enable optional features and language support. It deploys via a PowerShell script, placing architecture-specific CABs under tools\amd64 or tools\arm64cpu and matching language packs, with an optional backup of OEM images. Detection uses the registry key HKLM:\SOFTWARE\YourCompanyNameHere\Client-Recovery with value 1.0.0.
keywords: how to resize windows recovery partition
author: Niklas Rast

securityCheck.aiSummary: No malicious activity detected. The script is a powerful admin tool for managing the WinRE environment. Primary security considerations are risk of data loss or misconfiguration due to partition edits; mitigations include strict change control, backups, validation, and controlled execution via Intune. Logging should be secured to prevent sensitive information exposure.
